Contact

Questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries

✉️

Email us

For questions, feedback, bug reports, or partnership inquiries:

hello@tipright.app

We typically respond within 2–3 business days.

Common topics

  • • Bug report: Include the page URL and what went wrong
  • • Content correction: Let us know which page and what needs fixing
  • • New calculator request: Tell us which service you'd like to see added
  • • Partnership or advertising: Include your company name and proposal
